sentences.arabic: السَّمَاءُ فِي اللَّيْلِ لَوْحَةٌ فَنِّيَّةٌ رَائِعَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Nebo je noću prekrasna umjetnička slika.
sentences.translationEn: The sky at night is a wonderful artistic painting.

sentences.arabic: النُّجُومُ الصَّغِيرَةُ تَظْهَرُ مِثْلَ مَصَابِيحَ صَغِيرَةٍ فِي الظَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Male zvijezde se pojavljuju poput sitnih svjetiljki u mraku.
sentences.translationEn: The small stars appear like tiny lamps in the darkness.

sentences.arabic: يَصِفُ الشُّعَرَاءُ الْقَمَرَ بِأَنَّهُ مَلِكُ اللَّيْلِ الْجَمِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnici opisuju mjesec kao lijepog kralja noći.
sentences.translationEn: Poets describe the moon as the beautiful king of the night.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الصُّوَرُ الْبَلَاغِيَّةُ تَجْعَلُ اللُّغَةَ الْعَرَبِيَّةَ غَنِيَّةً جِدّاً.
sentences.translation: Ove retoričke slike čine arapski jezik veoma bogatim.
sentences.translationEn: These rhetorical images make the Arabic language very rich.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَسْتَمْتِعُ بِرُؤْيَةِ هَذَا الْجَمَالِ وَنَفْكُرُ فِي خَالِقِ الْكَوْنِ.
sentences.translation: Mi uživamo gledajući ovu ljepotu i razmišljamo o Stvoritelju svemira.
sentences.translationEn: We enjoy seeing this beauty and think about the Creator of the universe.
